title: Sword Bot
description: A bot to practice your sword pvp skills on!
body:
# The Sword Practice Bot

✨**[Support Me!](https://patreon.com/CapTommy?utm_medium=unknown&utm_source=join_link&utm_campaign=creatorshare_creator&utm_content=copyLink)**✨

Ever wanted to practice sword pvp but didn't want to go on a server because you have one million ms, or you don't want to waste time coding a sword bot with Carpet Mod?  Well I have the perfect solution for YOU!  There are three different bots:
1. Normal
2. Hard
3. Hacker(flies around and has reach hacks).

This mod also makes it so that all damage trigger the knockback sound, servers should not be affected by this and should still play the correct damage sound.

**Enjoy!**

Hard Bot
 ![Hard Bot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/STYNPfBb/images/813802008c5b9a99b7b6a897303b4508ba129a4c.gif)
